reviews.review_description:
not too bad once you get used of the controls took a while but it is all good now.
the in-app purchases dont work though to bad as obviously then nobody can buy the supporter DLC

developer_response.body: Hello! We are pushing an update today! The DLC is now removed entirely since the game went back to a premium model. We had a 3 month free-to-play period with the in-game DLC but now there will be no microtransactions, just fun!

reviews.review_description: Hard to get off the ground but after that it is a blast to cruise around.
Headline says it all. It was completely unplayable.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Do you mean there is a bug? Or you can't get used to the controls?

If you meant a bug (controllers not tracking) this has been fixed for good! An update is coming today with the fix. (3.00.0)

reviews.review_description: This has to be the best standalone helicopter game. Great physics, stylized well, and a good amount of content! However there are a fair amount of bugs. Main annoying thing is when you’re playing the COOP zombie mode it always crashes after round 6. Something that could be added is a lever for the collective. That way you can set it and leave it, also would feel much more realistic.
Super nice game only multiplayer is hard cuz there arent alot of people to play with bit still best game on my headset

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We will host play sessions twice a week to raise the awareness of the game, that way we can grow the players! Come in our Discord to be notified when the play sessions are on!

reviews.review_title: This game is actually awsome and fun!
reviews.review_description: Heya, i need say that the game is very fun, it goes very smooth and is addictive! 100% worth buying it :)

developer_response.body: Cheers mate! It really means a lot to us 🤗🫡🚁🚁

reviews.review_description: Took a chance on this game as i like flying Helicopters, come to think of it i am a cockpit VR kind of guy & 💙 stick controls is my forte  [check out my YT 🫡 BlueBottles0]  anyways... short and sweet of this quick review is Copter Strike looks sweet, fly's sweet & plays Sweet! Game modes for Days!. Priced right with a great deal of content for you to be happy with 💥💯💥 trying to balance the review with both good & bad things, i cant! lol possibly needs bigger power units or upgrades, but as is right now. i am a Very happy i took a chance! 😁💙

developer_response.body: Cheers Blue! Means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description:
Thank you developer for your fast response 🙏 all working now.
Five stars from me ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐


Update:
OMG! I found the Zombie mode in Co-op, so mutch fun lol!😂

Great achievement managing to get Copter Strike running on the Quest 2 . It will be interesting to see if update 51 will up the performance? Many thanks to the developer for making this game

The  controls feel great ( once mastered ) and there is a good sense of  sim quality to flyings!
( Similar graphics & feel to Ultrawings)

I couldn't find anyone playing online ( early days though ) maybe bots are needed Mr developer please ?

I love low level flying at speed and once you make the cockpit fully transparent it's easy to land the helicopter in the courtyard of the square building!

Looks like a lot of fun to be had in the future.

developer_response.body: We are glad you like our work! Thanks for the review! Cheers!
